ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the market data */,
  "market_price" REAL /* Market price of Bitcoin */,
  "total_bitcoins" REAL /* Total number of Bitcoins in circulation */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of Bitcoin */,
  "trade_volume" REAL /* Trade volume of Bitcoin */,
  "block_size" REAL /* Size of the block */,
  "avg_block_size" REAL /* Average block size */,
  "n_orphaned_blocks" INTEGER /* Number of orphaned blocks */,
  "n_transactions_per_block" INTEGER /* Number of transactions per block */,
  "median_confirmation_time" REAL /* Median confirmation time */,
  "output_volume" REAL /* Output volume */,
  "estimated_transaction_volume" REAL /* Estimated transaction volume */,
  "estimated_transaction_volume_usd" REAL /* Estimated transaction volume in USD */,
  "interest" INTEGER /* Interest metric */,
  "timestamp" REAL /* Timestamp for the data */,
  "market_price_diff" REAL /* Difference in market price */,
  "lag_price1" REAL /* Lagging market price 1 day ago */,
  "lag_price2" REAL /* Lagging market price 2 days ago */,
  "lag_price3" REAL /* Lagging market price 3 days ago */,
  "lag_price10" REAL /* Lagging market price 10 days ago */,
  "daily_high" REAL /* Daily high market price */,
  "daily_low" REAL /* Daily low market price */,
  "weekly_high" REAL /* Weekly high market price */,
  "weekly_low" REAL /* Weekly low market price */,
  "monthly_high" REAL /* Monthly high market price */,
  "monthly_low" REAL /* Monthly low market price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the market data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the market data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the prediction */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted market price of Bitcoin */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Model used for prediction */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_used FOREIGN KEY ("model_used") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the predictive model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user executing the trade */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the trade was executed */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of Bitcoin traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee for the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the news was published */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact analysis */,
  "news_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the impact was analyzed */,
  "impact_score" REAL /* Score representing the impact of the news */,
  "analysis" TEXT /* Analysis of the news impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_impact_news_id FOREIGN KEY ("news_id") REFERENCES news ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the historical market data */,
  "market_price" REAL /* Market price of Bitcoin */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of Bitcoin */,
  "trade_volume" REAL /* Trade volume of Bitcoin */,
  "daily_high" REAL /* Daily high market price */,
  "daily_low" REAL /* Daily low market price */,
  "weekly_high" REAL /* Weekly high market price */,
  "weekly_low" REAL /* Weekly low market price */,
  "monthly_high" REAL /* Monthly high market price */,
  "monthly_low" REAL /* Monthly low market price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, trade) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluation" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the evaluation metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluation_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend analysis */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the trend analysis */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., upward, downward, sideways) */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value representing the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)
